title: agropyron junceum var. bessarabicum
intro: Agropyron junceum var. bessarabicum, also known as the Bessarabian wheat grass, is a variety of grass that belongs to the wheat grass family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. It can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing dried leaves in hot water or as a supplement in capsule form, with some reports also using it to make juice and infusions for its medicinal properties.
